title: Day 2 Writing Exercise — Self Introduction
instructions: नीचे दिए गए prompts के आधार पर अपने शब्दों में English में लिखें। Space में अपना answer लिखें।

tasks.prompt: Write a 5-sentence formal self-introduction including your name, city, and profession.
tasks.hindiPrompt: 5 sentences में अपना formal introduction लिखें जिसमें नाम, शहर और profession शामिल हो।
tasks.sampleAnswer: My name is Aman Verma. I am from Jaipur, Rajasthan. I currently work as a marketing executive at a private firm. I have two years of experience in digital marketing. I am passionate about learning new skills every day.

tasks.prompt: Write an informal introduction to a new friend (3-4 sentences).
tasks.hindiPrompt: एक नए दोस्त को informal तरीके से अपना introduction दें (3-4 sentences)।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Hi! I'm Neha. I'm from Pune, but I live in Mumbai now. I love traveling and painting. What about you?

tasks.prompt: Write your 'Tell me about yourself' interview answer.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Interview के 'Tell me about yourself' सवाल का जवाब लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Good morning. My name is Priya Singh. I completed my B.Tech in Computer Science from Delhi in 2021. I have been working as a software developer for two years at a reputed IT company. My key strength is problem-solving, and I am always eager to learn new technologies. I am looking forward to this opportunity.

tasks.prompt: Write about your family in 4-5 sentences using at least 3 vocabulary words from today's lesson.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने परिवार के बारे में 4-5 sentences लिखें, आज के lesson के कम से कम 3 words use करें।

tasks.prompt: Write your own 1-minute elevator pitch introducing yourself professionally.
Write a phone-call introduction script for calling a client for the first time.
tasks.hindiPrompt: किसी client को पहली बार call करने के लिए एक phone introduction script लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Hello, this is Aman calling from XYZ Pvt Ltd. Am I speaking with Mr. Verma? I'm calling regarding the proposal we sent last week.

tasks.prompt: Write an introduction message to send in a new WhatsApp/Slack work group.
tasks.hindiPrompt: एक नए WhatsApp/Slack work group में भेजने के लिए एक introduction message लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Hi everyone! I'm Neha, the new UI/UX designer joining the team this week. Looking forward to working with all of you.

tasks.prompt: Write a LinkedIn "About" section introducing yourself professionally.
tasks.sampleAnswer: I'm a data analyst with 3 years of experience in the fintech industry, skilled in Python and SQL. Passionate about turning data into actionable insights. Open to new opportunities in analytics.

tasks.prompt: Write your first-day-of-college introduction to your new classmates.
tasks.hindiPrompt: College के पहले दिन नए classmates को दिया जाने वाला introduction लिखें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Hi everyone, I'm Kartikeya from Kanpur. I completed my schooling from DAV Public School. I'm excited to be here and hope to make many new friends.

tasks.prompt: Write a 30-second group discussion opening introducing yourself and giving one opinion on the topic "Social Media: Boon or Bane".
tasks.hindiPrompt: "Social Media: Boon or Bane" topic पर एक 30-second group discussion opening लिखें जिसमें अपना introduction और एक opinion शामिल हो।

tasks.prompt: Correct these 5 sentences and rewrite them: "I am belongs to Pune.", "My good name is Kiran.", "I have two year experience.", "I am fresher.", "I am from Delhi city."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इन 5 गलत sentences को सही करके फिर से लिखें।

tasks.prompt: Write two versions of your introduction — one formal (for an interview) and one informal (for a new friend).
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने introduction के दो versions लिखें — एक formal (interview के लिए) और एक informal (नए दोस्त के लिए)।
